description:
A time tracker and timesheet app that lets you track work hours across projects.


- (Improvement) Description suggestions are now more visible, and width of the description picker is dynamic.
- (Improvement) Improved performance when deleting multiple entries.
- (Fix) Archived projects and tasks are visible in the project/task picker.
- (Fix) Icons not displaying properly on Windows 10.
- (Fix) App crashes when Start Timer option from the reminders notification is selected.
- (Fix) No internet connection banner display issue.
- (Fix) Incorrect Portuguese translations.
- (Fix) Delete button missing in the details window for entries created in offline mode.
- (Fix) Regular user cannot duplicate entries with archived projects.
- (Fix) When a task is required, a project without a task cannot be sat as the default.
- (Fix) User is logged out after logging out of the web and opening Preferences window.
- (Fix) Appearance of the Stop recording button in the Auto Tracker.
- Other bug fixes and performance improvements.
